mapping_description:
Created By : Swati Jain
Created On : 20-Feb-2012
Mapping Description : Data is being moved from the Source ( CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS ) from ODS R12 to Target Flat File(FF_CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TRANSACTION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CREATION_DATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CREATED_BY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TRANSACTION_TYPE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TRANSACTION_DATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.USER_ENTERED_FLAG, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.REQUEST_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PROGRAM_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.INTERFACE_SOURCE_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.INTERFACE_SOURCE_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.INV_TRANSACTION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PO_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PO_REVISION_NUM, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PO_UNIT_PRICE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CURRENCY_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ROUTING_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ROUTING_STEP_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.VENDOR_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.VENDOR_SITE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SUBINVENTORY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LOCATOR_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.WIP_ENTITY_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.WIP_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.BOM_RESOURCE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SUBSTITUTE_UNORDERED_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.INSPECTION_STATUS_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.INSPECTION_QUALITY_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.VENDOR_LOT_NUM, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.RMA_REFERENCE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.COMMENTS, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.DEPARTMENT_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.REASON_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.DESTINATION_CONTEXT, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LOCATOR_ATTRIBUTE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CHILD_INSPECTION_FLAG, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.INTERFACE_TRANSACTION_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.GROUP_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.QUANTITY_BILLED, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.MATCH_FLAG, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT_BILLED, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.MATCH_OPTION, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CUSTOMER_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CUSTOMER_SITE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LPN_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TRANSFER_LPN_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.MOBILE_TXN, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.QC_GRADE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PA_ADDITION_FLAG, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.CONSIGNED_FLAG, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_NUM, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.FROM_SUBINVENTORY, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.FROM_LOCATOR_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.AMOUNT, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.DROPSHIP_TYPE_CODE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LPN_GROUP_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.JOB_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TIMECARD_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TIMECARD_OVN, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.PROJECT_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.TASK_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.REQUESTED_AMOUNT, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.MATERIAL_STORED_AMOUNT, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.REPLENISH_ORDER_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LCM_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.UNIT_LANDED_COST, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.RECEIPT_CONFIRMATION_EXTRACTED, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.LCM_ADJUSTMENT_NUM, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.XML_DOCUMENT_ID, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS 
WHERE
 CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS.GES_UPDATE_DATE>'$$LastExtractDate'
